title: Call: If a stock option has a time value of 3...
summary: Calculate the intrinsic value of a call option from stock price and strike price.
prompt: If a stock option has a time value of $3 and an intrinsic value of $2, what is the option's total value?
solution: The total value of the option is the sum of its intrinsic value and time value: $2 (intrinsic) + $3 (time) = $5. [[24]]
